title: Shrimp Pasta
ingredients: 1 pound large shrimp, peeled and deveined
8 Roma tomatoes, peeled and diced (about 2½ cups)
2 tablespoons minced fresh basil (or 1 teaspoon dried basil)
½ teaspoon freshly ground black pepper
12 ounces spinach linguine, cooked al dente and drained
instructions: Melt butter in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Sauté shrimp for 2–3 minutes until firm and opaque; remove and set aside.
Add tomatoes and mushrooms to skillet; sauté 5 minutes.
Stir in basil, salt, and pepper.
Add cream and simmer until sauce reduces by about one-third, 5–7 minutes.
Stir in Parmesan cheese, reduce heat to low, and return shrimp to sauce. Heat gently for 1–2 minutes.
Toss sauce with warm pasta and serve immediately.
